title: Machine Learning A-Z
description: This comprehensive course covers machine learning concepts from basics to advanced topics. You will work with real-world datasets, build predictive models, and understand algorithms like regression, classification, and clustering using Python libraries such as Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and Pandas.

title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch using modern technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB. This course guides you step by step to build responsive websites and real-world applications, making you job-ready as a web developer.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Master Python programming for data analysis and visualization. Learn to work with libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib to clean, process, and analyze data. This course also introduces basic machine learning techniques for practical data science applications.
